series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of this series is to keep substantial information pertaining to mental health (MH) and developmental disabilities (DD). This series includes research on issues; resource materials; legislation; MH & DD policies; institutional information such as staffing patterns, and programming; reported and unreported legal cases and research and unreported legal cases and research; meeting notes. Issues covered might include any issue affecting OLRS clientele, such as housing, employment, discrimination, community MH/MR services, special education, sterilization, institutional conditions, abuse, nursing home, etc. The ultimate purpose is to have information pertinent to and helpful for requests for information or assistance.
